pages.title: Breeding Seasons
pages.text:
Animals can only breed during their natural season. Try to breed out of season and nothing will happen. $(a)Domestic animals$() have earned enough trust to breed year-round.

Install $(l)Serene Seasons$() to enable this feature.

pages.title: Default Seasons
pages.text:
$(l)Cows$(): Spring, Summer
$(l)Pigs$(): Spring, Summer, Autumn
$(l)Sheep$(): Spring
$(l)Goats$(): Autumn, Winter
$(l)Chickens$(): Spring, Summer

Seasons can be changed per-animal in the mod config.

pages.title: Coat Genetics
pages.text:
Every animal carries two coat alleles — inherited from both parents in a Punnett-square style. The dominant allele determines appearance.

$(0)Normal$() › $(8)Dark$() › $(7)Cream$() › $(f)Albino$()

Albino is the rarest — both alleles must be Albino to express it.

pages.title: Inheritance
pages.text: Each parent contributes one random allele. Breeding two Cream animals gives a high chance of Cream offspring. Breeding a Normal with an Albino will almost always produce Normal offspring, but the Albino allele is hidden and can reappear in later generations.
